facebook.caption: If you have ever wanted to try scuba diving, Phu Quoc is one of the best places to start, and Vietnam Active on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is one of the best places to do it. This PADI 5 Star Diving Center has earned a perfect 5-star rating across more than 1,200 reviews, which tells you everything you need to know about the quality here. Whether you are a complete beginner looking for a Discover Scuba session or a certified diver ready to explore the reefs, the team handles both with care. Practical tip: the dry season from November to April brings the clearest visibility underwater, so plan your dive days accordingly.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the bubbles rise as divers slip beneath the surface off Phu Quoc. Vietnam Active makes the whole experience feel approachable, from the gear check on shore to the moment the reef comes into view below you. Over 1,200 visitors have given this PADI 5 Star center a perfect score, and the footage makes it easy to see why.

instagram.caption: A perfect 5-star rating from 1,271 divers does not happen by accident. Vietnam Active on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is Phu Quoc's go-to PADI 5 Star Diving Center for beginners and experienced divers alike. Best visibility: November to April.
instagram.video_caption: Fins on, mask down, and in you go. Vietnam Active makes Phu Quoc's underwater world genuinely accessible, whether it is your first breath underwater or your hundredth. Over 1,200 five-star reviews back that up.

tiktok.caption: Phu Quoc has reefs worth diving and Vietnam Active has 1,271 five-star reviews to prove it. PADI certified, beginner friendly. #PhuQuocDiving #VietnamActive #ScubaDiving #PhuQuoc
